game.title: Left 4 Dead 2
game.description: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

localized_description.text: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

Ambientado en el apocalipsis zombi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) es la esperadísima secuela del galardonado Left 4 Dead, el juego cooperativo número 1 de 2008. 

 Este FPS cooperativo de acción y terror os llevará a ti y a tus amigos por las ciudades, pantanos y cementerios del Sur Profundo, desde Savannah hasta Nueva Orleans, a lo largo de cinco extensas campañas.

 Jugarás como uno de los cuatro nuevos supervivientes, armado con un amplio y devastador arsenal de armas clásicas y mejoradas. Además de las armas de fuego, también tendrás la oportunidad de masacrar a los infectados con diversas armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo, desde motosierras hasta hachas, e incluso una mortífera sartén.

 Pondrás a prueba estas armas contra tres espantosos y formidables nuevos infectados especiales (o jugarás como ellos en el modo Enfrentamiento). También te encontrarás con cinco nuevos infectados comunes no comunes, incluyendo a los aterradores embarrados.

 AI Director 2.0 lleva la jugabilidad frenética y repleta de acción de L4D a un nivel superior. Esta versión mejorada de Director tiene la capacidad de modificar por procedimientos la meteorología en la que luchas y las rutas que tomas, además de adaptar la población enemiga, los efectos y los sonidos para ajustarlos a tus acciones. L4D2 promete una experiencia satisfactoria, única y desafiante en cada partida, personalizada de acuerdo con tu estilo de juego.

   Acción cooperativa de nueva generación de la mano de los creadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress y Counter-Strike.

   Más de 20 nuevas armas y objetos encabezados por más de 10 armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo (hacha, motosierra, sartén, bate de béisbol...) te permitirán enfrentarte a los zombis desde bien cerca.

   Nuevos supervivientes. Nueva historia. Nuevos diálogos. 

   Cinco extensas campañas para los modos Cooperativo, Enfrentamiento y Supervivencia.

   Un modo multijugador completamente nuevo.

   Infectados comunes no comunes. Cada una de las cinco nuevas campañas contiene al menos un nuevo tipo de zombi común no común exclusivo de esa campaña. 

   AI Director 2.0: La avanzada tecnología bautizada como AI Director caracterizó la jugabilidad única de L4D permitiendo ajustar dinámicamente la población enemiga, los efectos y la música a las acciones de los jugadores. L4D2 incorpora el nuevo AI Director 2.0, que amplía la capacidad del Director para personalizar el diseño de los niveles, los objetos del entorno, la meteorología y la iluminación para reflejar los diferentes momentos del día.

   Un sistema de estadísticas, clasificaciones y premios que fomenta el juego cooperativo.

Situé dans un univers post-apocalyptique peuplé de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 est la suite très attendue du meilleur jeu de coop de 2008. 

 Ce jeu de tir d'action et de coop à la première personne entraîne votre équipe dans les cimetières et marécages, de Savannah à La Nouvelle-Orléans en 5 campagnes.

 Vous incarnerez l'un des quatre survivants et vous disposerez d'un vaste arsenal d'armes de destruction classiques et améliorables. En plus des armes à feu, vous aurez également accès à des armes tranchantes et contondantes pour produire un maximum de dégâts en corps à corps : tronçonneuses, haches et la mortelle poêle à frire.

 Ces armes seront à mettre à l'épreuve (ou à utiliser en mode Versus) contre d'horribles adversaires comme les trois nouveaux infectés spéciaux. Vous rencontrerez également cinq nouveaux zombies communs singuliers, notamment les terribles Mudmen (Boueux).

 La jouabilité nerveuse orientée action du jeu est portée à un niveau supérieur par une nouvelle intelligence artificielle : AI Director 2.0. Cette nouvelle version de Director modifie procéduralement la météo de vos combats et les chemins que vous empruntez, et adapte le nombre de vos adversaires, les sons et les effets selon vos performances. L4D2 vous apportera une expérience unique et adaptée à votre style de jeu à chaque session.

   Jeu d'action et de coopération nouvelle génération par les créateurs de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress et Counter-Strike.

   Avec plus de vingt armes et objets, dont au moins dix armes de corps à corps (hache, tronçonneuse, poêle à frire, batte de base-ball...), vous tiendrez les zombies en respect.

   Nouveaux survivants, nouvelle histoire, nouveaux dialogues. 

   Cinq nouvelles campagnes pour les modes coopératifs, survie et en opposition (Versus).

   Un tout nouveau mode multijoueur.

   Zombies communs singuliers. Chacune des cinq campagnes contient au moins un type de zombie commun singulier exclusif. 

   AI Director 2.0 : la technologie avancée d'AI Director avait façonné la jouabilité unique de L4D en personnalisant l'introduction des adversaires, les effets et la musique en fonction des performances du joueur ou de la joueuse. L4D2 utilise AI Director 2.0, qui étend les possibilités de personnalisation à la composition de l'environnement des cartes, aux objets du monde virtuel, à la météo, aux effets spéciaux et aux variations des éclairages en fonction de l'heure de la journée.

   Statistiques, classements et système de récompense pour le jeu coopératif.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2), das Zombieapokalypsenabenteuer schlechthin, ist die mit Spannung erwartete Fortsetzung des preisgekrönten Spiels Left 4 Dead, der Nr. 1 unter den Koop-Spielen von 2008. 

 In diesem kooperativen Action-Horror-FPS durchstreifen Sie mit Ihren Freunden Städte, Sümpfe und Friedhöfe der amerikanischen Südstaaten in fünf groß angelegten Kampagnen von Savannah bis New Orleans.

 Spielen Sie als einer der vier neuen Überlebenden, ausgerüstet mit einer großen und verheerenden Anzahl bekannter und verbesserter Waffen. Nicht, dass Sie im Kampf gegen die Infizierten auf Feuerwaffen beschränkt wären – Sie können sich darüber hinaus auch mit Kettensägen, Äxten und tödlichen Bratpfannen austoben!

 Testen Sie die durchschlagende Wirkung dieser Waffen an drei grauenerregenden und respekteinflößenden, speziellen Infizierten (oder spielen Sie im Versus-Modus). Außerdem gibt es unter den fünf neuen und ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Infizierten jetzt die Mudmen.

 AI Director 2.0. bringt das schnelllebige, actionreiche Gameplay von L4D auf das nächste Level. Dieser verbesserte Director verändert das Wetter und die Wege, die Sie einschlagen, prozedural und passt Gegner, Effekte und Geräusche an Ihre Leistung an. Jede Partie von L4D2 ist eine rundum befriedigende und einzigartig herausfordernde Erfahrung, die auf Ihren Spielstil zugeschnitten ist.

   Koop-Action der nächsten Generation von den Entwicklern von Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress und Counter-Strike.

   Über 20 neue Waffen und Gegenstände, gekrönt von mehr als 10 Nahkampfwaffen – rücken Sie den Zombies mit Äxten, Kettensägen, Bratpfannen und Baseballschlägern aus nächster Nähe zu Leibe!

   Neue Überlebende. Neue Geschichte. Neue Dialoge. 

   Fünf groß angelegte Kampagnen für Koop-, Versus- und Survival-Modus.

   Ein brandneuer Mehrspielermodus.

   Ungewöhnlich gewöhnliche Infizierte. Jede der neuen fünf Kampagnen beinhaltet mindestens einen neuen ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Zombie, exklusiv zu dieser Kampagne gehörend. 

   AI Director 2.0: Die hochentwickelte Technologie namens „The AI Director“ macht das einzigartige Gameplay von L4D möglich, indem sie Gegner, Effekte und musikalische Untermalung basierend auf der Leistung der Spieler verändert. Der AI Director 2.0 in L4D2 verfügt über erweiterte Möglichkeiten, das Layout von Levels sowie Objekte, Wetter und Beleuchtung in der Spielwelt an unterschiedliche Tageszeiten anzupassen.

   Statistiken, Ranglisten und ein Belohnungssystem fördern kooperatives Spielen.

Passado num apocalipse de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) é a sequela ansiosamente aguardada do galardoado Left 4 Dead, o jogo cooperativo n.º 1 de 2008. 

 Este jogo cooperativo de tiros na primeira pessoa de ação e terror vai levar-te a ti e aos teus amigos por cidades, pântanos e cemitérios do interior sul dos Estados Unidos, de Savannah a Nova Orleães, ao longo de cinco extensas campanhas.

 Vais jogar como um de quatro novos sobreviventes, armados com uma variedade devastadora de armas clássicas e melhoradas. Além de armas de fogo, também terás a oportunidade de descarregar alguma agressividade nos infectados com uma variedade de armas corpo a corpo, como motosserras, machados e até a mortífera frigideira.

 Poderás ver em primeira mão a letalidade destas armas contra três novos infectados especiais horripilantes e formidáveis (ou se jogares como um deles no modo Versus). Também irás encontrar cinco novos infectados comuns incomuns, como os aterradores "homens de lama".

 Para ajudarmos a levar a jogabilidade frenética e repleta de ação do L4D para o próximo nível, desenvolvemos o Realizador de I.A. 2.0 (AI Director 2.0). Este Realizador melhorado tem a capacidade de alterar de forma procedimental o clima e os caminhos do teu trajeto, para além de personalizar a população de inimigos, os efeitos e os sons para corresponderem ao teu desempenho. O L4D2 garante uma experiência satisfatória e distintamente desafiadora em cada partida, adaptando-se ao teu estilo de jogo.

   Jogo de ação cooperativa da próxima geração, dos criadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.

   Mais de 20 novas armas e itens, incluindo mais de 10 armas corpo a corpo (como machados, motosserras, frigideiras, bastões de basebol) que te permitem lidar de perto com os zombies.

   Novos sobreviventes. Nova história. Novos diálogos. 

   Mais de cinco extensas campanhas para os modos Campanha, Versus e Sobrevivência.

   Um modo multijogador inédito.

   Infectados comuns incomuns. Cada uma das cinco novas campanhas conta com pelo menos um novo zombie comum incomum exclusivo. 

   Realizador de I.A. 2.0: uma tecnologia avançada conhecida como Realizador de I.A. (AI Director) foi responsável pela jogabilidade única do L4D, personalizando a população de inimigos, efeitos e música com base no desempenho dos jogadores. O L4D2 traz consigo o melhorado Realizador de I.A. 2.0, que expande a capacidade do Realizador de personalizar a disposição dos níveis, os mundo, o clima e até a iluminação do mundo, de modo a corresponder a diferentes alturas do dia.

   Um sistema de estatísticas, classificações e reconhecimentos estimula a cooperação.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) foregår i en zombie-apokalyptisk verden og er den længe ventede efterfølger til det prisvindende co-op-spil Left 4 Dead fra 2008. 

 Dette actionprægede FPS-gyserspil tager dig og dine venner gennem byer, sumper og kirkegårde i USA's sydstater i fem store kampagner.

 Du spiller som en af fire overlevende, der er bevæbnet med et bredt og altødelæggende arsenal af klassiske og opgraderede våben. Ud over at gå amok med skydevåben kan du også bruge alle mulige nærkampsvåben lige fra motorsave til økser til at give dine aggressioner frit løb og nedslagte inficerede zombier – der er endda en dødbringende stegepande.

 Våbnene bliver sat på prøve mod tre nye rædselsfulde og frygtindgydende specielle inficerede – eller du kan spille som en af dem i "Hold mod hold". Der er også fem nye ualmindelig almindelige inficerede, inklusive de rædselsfulde muddermænd.

 AI-manager 2.0 hjælper med til at tage L4D's vilde, actionpakkede gameplay til nye højder. Denne forbedrede manager kan ændre vejret, du kæmper i, eller de veje, du tager, og kan derudover tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og lyde, så det alt sammen passer til din præstation. L4D2 byder på en tilfredsstillende, unik og udfordrende oplevelse, som passer til din spillestil, hver gang du spiller.

   Næste generations co-op-actionspil fra skaberne af Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress og Counter-Strike.

   Over 20 nye våben og genstande med over 10 nærkampsvåben – økse, motorsav, stegepande, baseballkølle – der gør det muligt at komme helt tæt på zombierne.

   Nye overlevende. Ny historie. Ny dialog. 

   Fem omfattende kampagner til co-op og spiltilstandene "Hold mod hold" og "Overlevelse for hold".

   En helt ny multiplayertilstand.

   Ualmindelig almindelige inficerede. Hver af de fem nye kampagner har mindst én ualmindelig almindelig zombie, som er eksklusiv til den pågældende kampagne. 

   AI-manager 2.0: En avanceret teknologi kaldet AI-manager drev L4D's unikke gameplay ved at tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og musik baseret på spillerens præstation. L4D 2 kommer med AI-manager 2.0, som udvider managerens evne til at tilpasse banens layout, objekter i verden, vejret og belysningen for at afspejle forskellige tidspunkter på dagen.

   Samarbejde i spillet drives af statistikker, ranglister og et præmiesystem.

Ambientato durante l'apocalisse dei morti viventi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) è l'attesissimo sequel di Left 4 Dead, il gioco co-op numero 1 del 2008.

 Questo sparatutto in prima persona d'azione horror è un gioco co-op che porterà te e i tuoi amici tra le città, paludi e cimiteri del profondo sud degli Stati Uniti, da Savannah a New Orleans, attraverso cinque ampie campagne.

 Vestirai i panni di uno di quattro nuovi Sopravvissuti, armato di un vasto e devastante arsenale di armi classiche e migliorate. Oltre che con le armi da fuoco, avrai la possibilità di farla pagare agli Infetti con una varietà di sanguinose armi da mischia, dalle motoseghe alle asce, passando per la letale padella.

 Metterai alla prova queste armi contro tre potenti, orripilanti nuovi Infetti speciali (oppure ne dovrai evitare i colpi nella modalità Avversari). Te la vedrai anche con cinque nuovi Infetti comuni non comuni, tra cui gli spaventosi uomini di fango.

 Ad aiutare il gameplay frenetico e ricco d'azione di L4D a fare un ulteriore salto di qualità ci pensa l'IA Director 2.0. Questa versione migliorata del Director è in grado di modificare in maniera procedurale il meteo durante le tue battaglie e i percorsi che seguirai, oltre a regolare il numero e tipo di nemici, gli effetti e i suoni in base alle tue prestazioni. L4D2 promette un'esperienza soddisfacente e con sfide uniche ogni volta che si gioca, su misura per il tuo stile di gioco.

   Azione co-op di nuova generazione dai creatori di Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.

   Oltre 20 nuovi oggetti e armi, in particolare oltre 10 armi da mischia (tra cui ascia, motosega, padella, mazza da baseball), per permetterti di scontrarti corpo a corpo con gli zombi.

   Nuovi Sopravvissuti. Nuova trama. Nuovi dialoghi. 

   Cinque ampie campagne in modalità co-op, Avversari e Sopravvivenza.

   Una nuovissima modalità multigiocatore.

   Infetti comuni non comuni. Ognuna delle cinque nuove campagne presenta almeno un nuovo zombi comune non comune esclusivo per ciascuna campagna. 

   IA Director 2.0. Una nuova tecnologia avanzata, chiamata IA Director, dirigeva il gameplay unico di L4D, personalizzando i nemici presenti, gli effetti e la musica in base alle prestazioni dei giocatori. L4D2 è controllato dall'IA Director 2.0, che è in grado di personalizzare ancora di più la struttura dei livelli, gli oggetti di gioco, il meteo e la luminosità per riflettere i diversi momenti della giornata.

   Statistiche, classifiche e un sistema di ricompense incoraggiano uno stile gioco collaborativo.

game.brief: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

game.title: House Flipper
game.description: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

localized_description.text: 《房产达人》是个能让你成为一人房屋翻新团队的独特机会。购买、整修、升级破损的房屋，赋予它们新的生命，并以更高的价格卖出！

House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

在您购买第一处房产之前，您必须想办法获得一些启动资金。不过不用担心！ 幸运的是，有很多工作触手可及！接受附近居民的任务 —— 清洁房屋、粉刷墙壁、安装暖气片、淋浴和空调，甚至为他们的房屋布置家具！ 一旦客户为您的辛勤工作付了钱，你就可以购买属于自己的房子了。
 
      
 
 拿起你的锤子！粗鲁地推倒一些墙壁！清除碎玻璃碎片、垃圾和废弃家具，为彻底将房屋改头换面做好准备！你可以满足买家的每一个要求，你也可以将房屋布置成一个舒适的办公室来发展你的业务，怎么去做取决于你自己。
 
      
 
 幸运的是你并不孤单。 最值得信赖的工具就在这里！在您的油漆滚筒、窗户清洁剂、石膏工具、拖把、锤子，当然还有强大的平板电脑的帮助下，没有任何装修任务会吓到您！使用这些工具还可以为您提供经验，你将可以升级它们并磨练您的技能，使您的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 无论您是打算建造梦想中的房子、帮助居民进行翻修还是单纯地喜欢破坏东西，这些都无关紧要 ——《房产达人》将帮助您放松心情。 坐下来，忘掉日常烦恼，沉浸在《房产达人》的世界中吧！

購買你的第一項房產前，先需要賺到足夠的錢。不必擔心，幸好有不少的工作！接受來自鄰里的任務：清潔他們的房屋、將牆壁塗油漆、安裝暖氣、淋浴間或冷氣、甚至布置整個房產。滿意的客戶會向你提供不錯的報酬，而你會逐漸地接近買自己的房子的目標。
 
      
 
 拿起鎚子！是時候讓自己有點骯髒，並且拆掉幾張牆壁。處理碎玻璃、垃圾、剩下的家具部件，並且準備全面改造的空間。想要達到個別客戶的所有要求還是為自己做一間十分適合自營的，舒適的辦公室，由你決定。
 
      
 
 幸好，你並不孤單。油漆滾筒、玻璃刮水器、漆刀、拖把、鎚子與可靠的平板電腦......在最忠心耿耿夥伴：即工具的幫助下，任何任務都不可怕。使用它們讓你獲得經驗以便使你的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 不管你打算建設夢想裡的房屋，幫助居民翻新房子還是搗毀些甚麼，《房產達人》幫你放鬆。舒服地坐下，忘記日常的煩惱，並且埋頭《房產達人》世界！

You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. 
 No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! 
 Take job offers from nearby residents - clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! 
 Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.
 
 
      
 
 Grab your hammer! It's time to take a bit of a rude approach and knock some walls down! 
 Get rid of broken glass shards, litter, and leftover pieces of furniture, to prepare the place for a complete makeover! 
 It's up to you to either meet every single requirement of specific buyers or make yourself a cozy office to grow your business in.
 
      
 
 Fortunately, you're not alone. The set of your trustiest tools is here with ya! 
 With the help of your paint roller, window cleaner, plaster tool, mop, hammer, and of course, the mighty tablet, no renovation will scare you! 
 Using those tools also gives you experience, which can be used to upgrade them and polish your skills, making your work even more pleasant.
 
      
 
 Regardless if you plan to create the house of your dreams, help the residents with their renovations or feel the need to smack some walls - 
 House Flipper is here for You! So just sit comfortably, let go off your usual daily routine, and delve into the world of House Flipper... into your world!

Antes de poder adquirir tu primera propiedad, debes ganártela. 
 No te preocupes, ¡por suerte hay mucho que hacer! Acepta ofertas de trabajo de los residentes: 
 limpia sus casas, pinta las paredes, instala calefacción, duchas y aire acondicionado, e incluso amuebla propiedades enteras. 
 Si los clientes quedan satisfechos recompensarán bien tu trabajo y cada vez estarás más cerca de comprar tu propia casa.
 
      
 
 ¡Martillo en mano! Es hora de ensuciarse un poco y tirar algunas paredes. 
 Deshazte de los trozos de vidrio, la basura, los restos de muebles y prepara el espacio para una metamorfosis completa. 
 De ti depende si quieres cumplir todos los requisitos de los compradores o prefieres organizar una oficina acogedora, 
 perfecta para administrar tu propio negocio.
 
      
 
 Por suerte, no estás solo. Un rodillo de pintura, un limpiacristales, una espátula, una fregona, un martillo y una tableta... 
 Con ayuda de tus compañeros más fieles, las herramientas, ningún pedido será terrible. 
 Con ellas podrás ganar experiencia y desarrollar habilidades, lo que hará que tu trabajo sea aún más agradable.
 
      
 
 No importa si planeas crear la casa de tus sueños, ayudar a los residentes con sus reformas o romper algo, 
 House Flipper te ayudará a relajarte. 
 ¡Siéntate, olvídeate de las preocupaciones diarias y sumérjete en el mundo de House Flipper!

Vous devrez économiser un peu avant de pouvoir acheter votre première propriété. Mais pas d'inquiétudes ! 
 Vous avez accès à de nombreuses missions ! Acceptez les contrats de vos voisins - nettoyez, peignez, installez, et meublez leur propriété ! 
 Une fois que vos clients vous auront payé pour votre dur labeur, vous pourrez acheter votre propre maison.
 
      
 
 Prenez un marteau ! Il est temps de vous défouler et de détruire quelques murs ! 
 Débarrassez-vous des débris de verre, des détritus et des vieux meubles, et préparez l'endroit pour une rénovation complète ! 
 À vous de décider si vous voulez vous plier à toutes les exigences des acheteurs, 
 ou si vous voulez vous concevoir un bureau confortable pour vous développer encore plus.
 
      
 
 Heureusement, vous n'êtes pas seul. Vous êtes accompagné d'un ensemble d'outils très fiables ! 
 Avec l'aide d'un rouleau de peinture, d'un lave-vitre, de plâtre, d'un balai, d'un marteau, 
 et bien sûr, d'une tablette, aucune rénovation ne vous fera reculer ! 
 Utiliser ces outils augmentera votre expérience, qui vous permettra de les améliorer, eux et vos compétences, rendant la tâche plus agréable.
 
      
 
 Que vous vouliez créer la maison de vos rêves, aider vos voisins à rénover leur maison, ou démolir quelques murs - House Flipper est là pour vous ! 
 Alors asseyez-vous confortablement, abandonnez votre routine habituelle, 
 et plongez dans le monde de House Flipper… dans votre monde !

Du musst dir hier zuerst einen Namen machen, bevor du deine erste Immobilie kaufen kannst. 
 Aber mach dir keine Sorgen, denn zum Glück gibt es hier mehr Arbeit als genug! 
 Nimm Jobangebote von Einwohnern in der Umgebung an - Reinigungen, Wände anstreichen, Heizungen, 
 Duschen und Klimaanlagen installieren oder sogar ganze Immobilien möblieren! 
 Sobald die dankbaren Kunden deine zuverlässige Arbeit bezahlt haben, kannst du dir ein eigenes Haus kaufen.
 
      
 
 Schnapp dir deinen Hammer, denn wir werden hart zuschlagen und ein paar Mauern zerstören! 
 Entsorge Glasscherben, Abfälle und Möbelreste, um die Immobilie auf eine Runderneuerung vorzubereiten! 
 Du musst dich entscheiden, ob du allen Bedingungen bestimmter Käufer nachkommen 
 oder dein eigenes gemütliches Büro bauen möchtest, damit dein Geschäft wachsen kann.
 
      
 
 Glücklicherweise bist du nicht alleine, denn du hast deine treuen Werkzeuge dabei! 
 Dank deiner Farbroller, Fensterputzer, Putzwerkzeuge, Wischer, Hammer - und natürlich - 
 dem mächtigen Tablet, bist du jeder Renovierung gewachsen! 
 Diese Werkzeuge bringen dir auch Erfahrungspunkte ein, damit du sie und deine Fähigkeiten verbessern kannst. 
 Dadurch wird deine Arbeit noch angenehmer.
 
      
 
 Egal ob du das Haus deiner Träume bauen, den Einwohnern bei ihren Renovierungen helfen 
 oder ein paar Wände zerstören möchtest - House Flipper ist immer für dich da! 
 Lehn dich also zurück, lass deine täglichen Routinen hinter dir und tauche in die Welt von House Flipper ein ... deiner Welt!

Para poder comprar o teu primeiro imóvel precisas ganhar um pouco de dinheiro. 
 Não te preocupes - felizmente, há muito trabalho para ti! Aceita as ofertas de emprego dos residentes da zona 
 - limpa as suas casas, pinta as paredes, faz a instalação de aquecimento, do sistema de duche ou de ar condicionado ou, 
 até mesmo, mobília casas inteiras. Os clientes satisfeitos pagaram bem pelo teu trabalho e tu, 
 com cada cheque de pagamento, estarás mais perto de comprar a tua própria casa.
 
      
 
 Apanha o martelo! Chegou a hora de te sujar e derrubar umas paredes. 
 Tira os pedaços de vidro, lixo, restos de móveis e prepara o espaço para uma metamorfose completa.
 
      
 
 Felizmente, não estás sozinho. O teu rolo de pintura, o limpa-vidros, a espátula, a esfregona, o martelo e o táblete que nunca falha... 
 Com a ajuda dos companheiros mais leais, ou seja, as tuas ferramentas, nenhum trabalho será difícil. 
 Ao usá-los ganharás experiência e melhorarás as habilidades e, assim, o teu trabalho vai tornar-se ainda mais agradável.
 
      
 
 Não importa se estás a pensar em criar a casa dos teus sonhos, ajudas os residentes a realizar renovações ou, 
 simplesmente, sentes vontade de arrebentar alguma coisa - 
 o House Flipper vai ajudar-te a relaxar. Senta-te, esqueça as tuas preocupações diárias e mergulha no mundo do House Flipper!

最初の財産を買う前に、あなたは必要なお金を稼がなければならない。
 心配しないで、儲けるチャンスは幾らでもある！例えば、地元住民からの仕事を受け入れる手がある：
 彼らの家を掃除したり、壁を塗ったり、暖房やシャワーやエアコンなど設置したりして、物件全体を整える事もあるだろう。
 満足された依頼人はあなたの働きに十分に報いるだろうから、あなたが段々自分の家を買うことに近づく。
 
      
 
 ハンマーを手に！壁数枚を壊しましょう。ガラスの破片とゴミ、家具のスクラップなどを取り除き、完全なリフォームに向けてスペースを準備する。
 個々の依頼人のすべての要件を満たしすか、あなた自身のビジネスを運営するのに最適な居心地の良いオフィスを手配したいのかはあなた次第だ。
 
      
 
 幸いなことに、あなたは一人ではない。ペイントローラーやウィンドウウォッシャー、パテナイフにモップとハンマー、そして頼もしいタブレット...　
 その全てがあなたの信用できる戦友であるツールだ。その助けがあれば、どんな注文でも問題なく完成できる。
 道具を使用すれば、経験を積み、スキルを磨くことができ、仕事が楽しくなる一方。
 
      
 
 夢の家を作ることを図っているのか、入居者をリフォームに助けたいのか、単に何かを壊したいのかは関係ない!
 『House Flipper』はあなたにリラックスさせるに違いない。
 腰を掛けて、毎日の悩みを忘れ、「House Flipper」の世界に没頭しよう！

  Não te preocupes - felizmente, há muito trabalho para ti! Aceita as ofertas de emprego dos residentes da zona 
  - limpa as suas casas, pinta as paredes, faz a instalação de aquecimento, do sistema de duche ou de ar condicionado ou, 
  até mesmo, mobília casas inteiras. Os clientes satisfeitos pagaram bem pelo teu trabalho e tu, 
  com cada cheque de pagamento, estarás mais perto de comprar a tua própria casa.
  
       
  Apanha o martelo! Chegou a hora de te sujar e derrubar umas paredes. 
  Tira os pedaços de vidro, lixo, restos de móveis e prepara o espaço para uma metamorfose completa.
  
       
  Felizmente, não estás sozinho. O teu rolo de pintura, o limpa-vidros, a espátula, a esfregona, o martelo e o táblete que nunca falha... 
  Com a ajuda dos companheiros mais leais, ou seja, as tuas ferramentas, nenhum trabalho será difícil.

Du skal gøre dig fortjent til det, før du køber din første ejendom. Ingen bekymringer dog! 
  Heldigvis er der masser af arbejde lige ved hånden! Tag jobtilbud fra beboere i nærheden - 
  ryd op, mal vægge, installer varmeapparater, brusere og klimaanlæg, eller indret hele deres ejendom! 
  Når de taknemmelige kunder har betalt dig for dit solide arbejde, er det tid til at få dit eget hus.
  
       
  Tag din hammer! Det er tid til at benytte en hårdhændet tilgang og smadre nogle vægge! 
  Slip af med glasskår, affald og rester af møbler for at forberede stedet til en komplet makeover! 
  Det er op til dig enten at opfylde hvert enkelt krav fra bestemte købere eller lave dig selv til et hyggeligt kontor at vokse din virksomhed i.
  
       
  Heldigvis er du ikke alene. Sættet med dine mest pålidelige værktøjer er med dig! 
  Ved hjælp af malerulle, vinduespudser, gips værktøj, moppe, hammer og selvfølgelig den mægtige tablet vil ingen renovering skræmme dig! 
  Brug af disse værktøjer giver dig også erfaring, som kan bruges til at opgradere dem og polere dine færdigheder, hvilket gør dit arbejde endnu mere behageligt.
  
       
  Det er ligegyldigt, om du planlægger at oprette dit drømmehus, hjælpe beboere med renoveringer, eller om du vil smadre noget - 
  House Flipper hjælper dig med at slappe af. 
  Læn dig tilbage, glem hverdagens bekymringer og fordyb dig i en verden af House Flipper!

Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Martello in mano! È ora di sporcarsi un po' e abbattere qualche muro. 
  Sbarazzati di schegge di vetro, spazzatura, avanzi di mobili e prepara lo spazio per una metamorfosi completa. 
  Sta a te se vuoi soddisfare tutte le esigenze dei singoli acquirenti o 
  preferisci organizzarti un ufficio accogliente, perfetto per gestire la tua attività.
  
       
  Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Non importa se hai intenzione di creare la casa dei tuoi sogni, aiutare i residenti con 
  i lavori di ristrutturazione o se vuoi rompere qualcosa - House Flipper ti aiuterà a rilassarti. 
  Accomodati, dimentica le preoccupazioni quotidiane e immergiti nel mondo di House Flipper!

game.brief: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

game.title: Castlevania III: Dracula's Curse
game.description: Led by the immortal Count Dracula, the greatest army of evil ever assembled is poised to bury mankind in a Tomb of Terror. Destroying this legion of Swamp Dragons, Slasher Skeletons and Forces of the Undead will be the supreme challenge for the mightiest of warriors. Your place in history is 100 years before Simon Belmont's birth. Dracula is young at heart, and it will take more than a stake to penetrate his evil. Luckily, you command the role of Trevor - Simon's forefather and the origin of the Belmont Warlord Chromosomes. Trevor has a power never before seen by human eyes - the power to transform into three different spirits: Grant DaNasty, the ferocious Ghost Pirate. Sypha, the Mystic Warlord. And Alucard, Dracula's forgotten son. You must perfectly time Trevor's body transformations to match up his different fighting spirits against Ultimate Evils. Trevor also has the strength and wisdom to command the Battle Axe, Invisibility Potion and Mystic Whip. But the most important weapon Trevor has is your cunning to choose the correct Paths of Fate and your bravery to lead him past 17 possible levels of never-ending doom, including the Haunted Ship of Fools, the Sunken City of Poltergeists, the Clock Tower of Untimely Death and Curse Castle. Never before have so many dangers confronted you at one time. And if by some miracle you triumph, you'll no longer be a mere mortal. You'll be a legend who'll live forever!

game.title: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs
game.description:
Cadillacs and Dinosaurs is a side-scrolling, beat 'em up arcade game based on the comic book series Xenozoic Tales. In the game, the player has access to several attacks. Each character has two special moves including one that depletes a character's health upon contact with an enemy and when two or more players play together, they can trigger a team-attack. Players can also find and use various firearms, throwing weapons such as rocks and explosives, and melee weapons such as clubs.

The plot is based on the comic Cadillacs and Dinosaurs and takes place in the "City In The Sea" and its neighboring nearby jungle. The story starts 500 years from the 20th century, when an ensemble gang called the Black Marketeers begin hunting the dinosaurs to serve their unknown purpose. The continuous hunting process has made the dinosaurs violent and now they have started attacking villages and people.

In order to get things sorted again, mechanic and shaman Jack Tenrec, diplomat and explorer by profession Hannah Dundee, friend and engineer Mustapha Cairo, and mysterious Mess O'Bradovich have decided to team up against the evil deeds of the Black Marketeers. The protagonists reach "the City in the Sea" where they suspect the whole hunting network being operating from.

《恐龙快打》是由日本CAPCOM公司出品的一款著名的街机游戏。游戏改编自1993年美国CBS开始放送的《Xenozoic Tales》 ,靠经典商业题材--“恐龙”来卖座。舞台设定在已经发生翻天覆地之变化的恐龙和人类共存的26世纪。在这个作品中，道具的作用得到了很大的强化，所有的枪械道具都有弹药的概念，弹药用完就只能作为一次性的投掷道具了。甚至可以抢到Boss的武器来反制，像木桶一类的容器道具不再是仅仅为得到其中的物品被砸破了，它们可以被抬起投掷出去。 除此之外恐龙新世纪继承了Capcom惯例的多攻击方式。

game.title: The Void
game.description:
A first-person game in which after starving to death, the player wakes up in the Void, a dying land housing numerous Sisters and long-absent Brothers, all of whom subsist on Color, the essence of life in the Void. With the player's arrival, a resurgence of Color is observed in the Void, prompting the Brothers to return and subject the player to various trials so that he may also become a Brother by using and sharing Color.

When a person’s soul is extinguished, for a brief flickering moment it passes The Void—a grey limbo, breathed back to life by scarce droplets of Color scattered across it. Ravenous, monstrous Brothers beckon the soul to preserve every bit of it; enticing, sly Sisters beg to be fed. The whole Void, inhabited also by a multitude of weird and sometimes scary creatures, changes with every droplet of Color used, making every action you take have repercussions across the whole world.

But perhaps there is another way to use the Color. The way to break out of the never-ending cycle of the Void. Nourishing Color in gardens and fighting the Void’s creatures, unlocking the Sisters’ hearts and taking on their Brothers, the player gets the chance to find it… and achieve ultimate transcendence.

game.title: Nine Sols
game.description:
Nine Sols is a lore rich, hand-drawn 2D action-platformer featuring Sekiro-inspired deflection focused combat, immersive storytelling, and unique Taopunk setting. Embark on a journey of Asian fantasy, explore the land once home to an ancient alien race, and follow a vengeful hero’s quest to slay the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm.

In New Kunlun, hero Yi has awakened the 9 rulers of this forsaken realm. To defeat the 9 Sols in the deserted city.

“Becomes one with the way of Tao…”

New Kunlun, the Solarian’s last sanctuary, has remained quiet for centuries. Inside this vast realm, the ancient gods left mortals with a promised land that is forever protected by the sacred rituals, yet the truth of this world remains unknown to most. Everything changes when Yi, a long forgotten hero from the past, is awoken by a human child.

Follow Yi on his vengeful quest against the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm, and obliterate any obstacles blocking your way in Sekiro-lite style combat. Explore in unique “Taopunk” setting that blends cyberpunk elements with Taoism and far eastern mythology. Unravel the mysteries of an ancient alien race and learn about the fate of mankind.

game.title: Atlyss
game.description: Enter the world of ATLYSS, a single-player/online RPG where you can fight with or against friends in a surreal world filled with creatures beyond comprehension. Customize and progress your character(s), complete quests, and discover strange locations.

game.title: Crash Bandicoot
game.description:
Crash Bandicoot is the first installment in the Crash Bandicoot series that established Naughty Dog's reputation in the video game industry. Its premises chronicle the creation of the titular Crash, a bandicoot who has been uplifted by the mad scientist Doctor Neo Cortex. The goal of Crash Bandicoot is to traverses several levels in sequence in order to progress. The game is played from a third-person perspective in which the camera trails behind Crash, though some levels showcase forward-scrolling and side-scrolling perspectives. Crash is able to defeat enemies by either jumping on them or using a spinning attack that launches them.

Dr. Neo Cortex and Dr. Nitrus Brio, two evil doctors determined to take over the world, create two devices to turn innocent creatures into genius destroyers of the world. One particular animal, a Bandicoot, is chosen to be the leader of the pack, but when the devices fail in their attempts, the animals are turned into crazy monsters. Only Crash Bandicoot survives with brain intact, now knowing that Neo Cortex is the real bad guy. Cortex notices the threat that Crash may cause, and banishes Crash to another island. So it is up to Crash to find his way through the islands monster population and stop Cortex from destroying the world, as well as saving his girlfriend who is next on the devices list.

game.title: Super Smash Bros.
game.description: Super Smash Bros. is a crossover fighting video game between several different Nintendo franchises, and the first installment in the Super Smash Bros. series. Players must defeat their opponents multiple times in a fighting frenzy of items and power-ups. Super Smash Bros. is a departure from the general genre of fighting games: instead of depleting an opponent's life bar, the players seek to knock opposing characters off a stage. Each player has a damage total, represented by a percentage, which rises as the damage is taken.

game.title: Baroque
game.description:
Baroque is horror-themed action game with elements of survival gameplay. The whole game is set in the tower: you slowly work your way to the top, fighting demons as you progress. You have HP as well as stamina gauge. If your stamina is depleted, you walk slower and can't react well in a battle.

Set after a world-altering cataclysm called the Blaze that took place on May 14, 2032, Baroque focuses on a nameless, mute, and amnesiac protagonist. Early on, he finds himself tasked with purifying the Meta-Beings, once-human creatures that have lost themselves to the delusions inside them, and reaching the bottom floor of a tower to gain redemption for his forgotten sin.
Through his interactions with the other characters and unlocked cutscenes, the player learns about the back-story and characters.

game.title: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden
game.description:
Hunt ghosts as two memorable characters in a story driven Action-RPG where your decisions have dramatic consequences. Solve haunting cases and battle supernatural forces combining Antea’s spiritual powers and Red’s arsenal.

New Eden, 1695. Antea Duarte and Red mac Raith are lovers and Banishers, ghost-hunters who vowed to protect the living from the threat of lingering ghosts and specters. Following a disastrous last mission, Antea is fatally wounded, becoming one of the spirits she loathes. In the haunted wilds of North America, the couple desperately searches for a way to liberate Antea from her new plight.

Hunt ghosts as two memorable characters in a story-driven Action-RPG where your decisions carry dramatic consequences. Torn between honoring your oath to the living and saving your departed partner, how far will you go for love?

New Eden, 1695. Antea Duarte and Red mac Raith are lovers and Banishers, ghost-hunters who vowed to protect the living from the threat of lingering ghosts and specters. Following a disastrous last mission, Antea is fatally wounded, becoming one of the spirits she loathes. In the haunted wilds of North America, the couple desperately searches for a way to liberate Antea from her new plight.

Immerse yourself in a beautiful, intimate and powerful story between two fated lovers. As Banishers, enter the lives of New Eden’s communities and solve haunting cases in a mystical, lore-rich world plagued with supernatural creatures and ancient secrets. Use your wits or combine Antea’s spiritual powers and Red’s arsenal to defeat and banish the souls tormenting the living.

Challenging decisions will lay on your path, dramatically impacting your story and the fate of New Eden’s inhabitants— be they living people or wandering souls. How much will you compromise your ghost-hunting vow for the sake of your lover who became one of such spirits?

game.title: Middle-earth: Shadow of War
game.description:
Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 

In Middle-earth: Shadow of War™, nothing will be forgotten.

localized_title.text: La Tierra Media: Sombras de Guerra
La Terre du Milieu : L'Ombre de la Guerre
Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra della Guerra

localized_description.text:
深入敌后，组建军队，攻破要塞，从内部统治魔多。体验我们荣膺嘉奖的宿敌系统打造出的独一无二的个性剧情，每一个敌人和追随者都充满新意，正面对抗强大无比的黑暗魔君索伦和他的戒灵，尽在这个鸿篇巨制的中土游戏。 
 

 
《中土世界™ : 战争之影™》，一切将被永恒铭记。

潛入敵軍陣線後方打造你的軍隊、征服堡壘，並從內部支配魔多。體驗獲獎的宿敵系統，如何運用每一位敵人和屬下來建立獨特的個人故事，並在中土世界的全新史詩故事中，面對黑暗魔君索倫和他的戒靈。 
 

 
在《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》，宿敵恩怨、從未遺忘。

Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 

In Middle-earth: Shadow of War™, nothing will be forgotten.

Actúa en territorio enemigo para forjar tu ejército, conquistar fortalezas y dominar Mordor desde dentro. Comprueba cómo el galardonado sistema Némesis crea historias personales únicas con cada enemigo y seguidor, y enfréntate al increíble poder del Señor Oscuro, Sauron, y sus Espectros del Anillo en esta nueva y épica historia de la Tierra Media. 

En La Tierra Media: Sombras de Guerra nada caerá en el olvido.

Allez derrière les lignes ennemies pour former votre armée, prenez le contrôle des forteresses et dominez le Mordor de l'intérieur. Découvrez comment le système Nemesis récompensé crée des histoires personnelles et uniques avec chaque ennemi et chaque partisan et affrontez la pleine puissance du Seigneur des Ténèbres Sauron et de ses Nazgûl dans cette nouvelle histoire épique de la Terre du Milieu. 

Dans La Terre du Milieu : L'Ombre de la Guerre, rien ne sera oublié.

Gehe hinter die feindlichen Linien, um eine Armee aufzustellen, Festungen zu erobern und Mordor von innen heraus zu beherrschen. Erlebe, wie das preisgekrönte Erzfeind-System mit jedem Feind und jedem Gefolgsmann einzigartige persönliche Geschichten erschafft und stelle dich in dieser epischen neuen Geschichte aus Mittelerde der ganzen Macht des Dunklen Herrschers Sauron und seiner Ringgeister.

Mittelerde: Schatten des Krieges - Nichts wird vergessen.

Esgueira-te por trás das linhas do inimigo para criar um exército, conquistar Fortalezas e dominar Mordor desde o seu interior. Vê como o premiado Sistema Nemesis cria histórias pessoais únicas com cada inimigo e seguidor, e enfrenta todo o poder do Senhor das Trevas Sauron e dos seus Espectros do Anel nesta épica nova história em Terra-Média. 
 

 
Em Middle-earth: Shadow of War, nada será esquecido.

敵陣に深く入り込んで軍隊を組織し、砦を制圧してモルドールを内側から支配しよう。数々の賞を受賞したネメシスシステムによって、一人ひとりの敵や支持者との間に独自の物語が形成される。壮大な中つ国を舞台に、強大な力を持つ冥王サウロンと指輪の幽鬼に挑もう。
 

 
シャドウ・オブ・ウォー、やつらは決して忘れない。

Go behind enemy lines to forge your army, conquer Fortresses and dominate Mordor from within. Experience how the award winning Nemesis System creates unique personal stories with every enemy and follower, and confront the full power of the Dark Lord Sauron and his Ringwraiths in this epic new story of Middle-earth. 
 

 
In Middle-earth: Shadow of War, nothing will be forgotten.

Gå om bag fjendens linjer for at opbygge din hær, erobre fæstninger og herske over Mordor. Oplev, hvordan det prisvindende Nemesis-system skaber personlige historier for hver fjende og følgesvend, og kæmp mod den mørke Sauron og hans ringånders fulde styrke i dette nye eventyr fra Midgård. 

I Middle-earth: Shadow of War bliver intet glemt.

Supera le linee nemiche per forgiare il tuo esercito, conquistare le Fortezze e dominare Mordor dall'interno. Scopri in che modo l'apprezzatissimo Sistema Nemesi riesca a creare storie personali uniche per ogni nemico e seguace e affronta l'immane potere dell'Oscuro Signore Sauron e dei suoi Spettri dell'Anello in questa nuova, epica storia della Terra di Mezzo. 

In La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra della Guerra, nulla sarà dimenticato.
畅玩《演示版中土世界™: 战争之影™》！首度体验这个荣膺嘉奖的宿敌系统。勇敢地挫败不可一世的领主并征服他们的堡垒。突破其部队的重重防守、支配他的队长并建立你自己的军团。完成演示版后，将你的领主转移到《中土世界™: 战争之影™》中，便可使其助你一同对抗索伦。探索诺恩地区，并踏上掌控全魔多的征途。
歡迎來玩《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》演示版！初次體驗受到大獎肯定的「宿敵系統」。打敗令人聞風喪膽的大王、征服他們的堡壘、瓦解他的軍團、支配敵方隊長、打造我方軍隊。演示版結束後，把你的大王傳送到《中土世界™：戰爭之影™》，讓他們協助你一同對抗索倫。立刻探索諾恩區域，勇闖魔多大地。

Play the Demo for Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™! Experience your first taste of the award-winning Nemesis System. Face down the dreaded overlord and conquer their fortress. Work your way through his forces, dominating his captains and build your own army. After completing the Demo, transfer your Overlord into Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™ where they can aid you in the fight against Sauron. Explore the region of Nûrn and take the leap into the land of Mordor.

¡Juega a la demo de La Tierra Media™: Sombras de Guerra™ y vive la experiencia del galardonado sistema Némesis! Haz frente al temible señor y conquista su fortaleza. Domina a sus capitanes para hacerte con sus fuerzas y forja tu propio ejército. Tras completar la demo, podrás transferir a tu señor a La Tierra Media™: Sombras de Guerra™, donde te ayudará a enfrentarte a Sauron. Explora la región de Núrnen y da un salto a la tierra de Mordor.

Jouez à la Démo de La Terre du Milieu™: L''Ombre de la Guerre™! Initiez-vous au système Nemesis récompensé. Tenez tête au redoutable Chef Suprême et prenez sa forteresse. Détruisez ses forces, dominez ses capitaines et forgez votre propre armée. Une fois la Démo terminée, envoyez votre Chef Suprême dans La Terre du Milieu™: L'Ombre de la Guerre™ là où il vous sera utile contre Sauron. Explorez la région de Núrn et avancez dans le Mordor.

Spiele die Demo für Mittelerde™: Schatten des Krieges™! Erlebe deinen ersten Vorgeschmack auf das preisgekrönte Erzfeind-System. Stelle dich dem gefürchteten Oberherrn und erobere seine Festung. Arbeite dich durch seine Truppen, beherrsche seine Hauptmänner und versammle deine eigene Armee. Bring deinen Oberherrn nach Abschluss der Demo zur kompletten Version von Mittelerde™: Schatten des Krieges™, wo er dir im Kampf gegen Sauron helfen kann. Erkunde das Gebiet Nurn und mache einen Sprung nach Mordor.

Joga a Demo de Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™! Prova esta primeira amostra do premiado Sistema Nemesis. Confronta o temível Overlord e conquista a sua fortaleza. Derrota as suas forças, domina os seus capitães e constrói o teu próprio exército. Quando terminares a Demo, transfere o teu Overlord para o Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™, onde te poderá ajudar na luta contra Sauron. Explora a região de Nûrn e aventura-te nas terras de Mordor.
シャドウ・オブ・ウォーの体験版をプレイしよう！ 数々の賞を受賞したネメシスシステムを体感しながら、恐ろしい首領と戦い、砦を制圧しよう。小隊長を支配し、自分だけの軍隊を作りあげて敵の軍勢を退けろ。体験版のクリア後は、シャドウ・オブ・ウォーの製品版に自分の首領を引き継いで、共にサウロンに挑むことが可能。ヌアンの地域を探索し、モルドールの地に飛び込もう

Work your way through his forces, dominating his captains and build your own army. After completing the Demo, transfer your Overlord into Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™ where they can aid you in the fight against Sauron. Explore the region of Nûrn and take the leap into the land of Mordor.

movie.title: Blade Runner
movie.description: In the smog-choked dystopian Los Angeles of 2019, blade runner Rick Deckard is called out of retirement to terminate a quartet of replicants who have escaped to Earth seeking their creator for a way to extend their short life spans.

localized_title.text: Blade Runner: O Caçador de Androides

localized_description.text: Rick Deckard è un ex poliziotto del L.A.P.D. (Los Angeles Police Department) richiamato forzatamente in servizio quando un gruppo di sofisticati androidi Nexus 6 fugge dalle colonie Extra-Mondo e torna clandestinamente sulla Terra. Quello che essi cercano è il loro costruttore, "colpevole" di averli dotati di un aspetto umano e capacità fisiche superiori, ma di una vita molto breve. La caccia di Deckard sarà violenta e serrata, resa più complessa dalla presenza di Rachael, un particolarissimo tipo sperimentale di replicante, femminile quanto e forse più di una donna autentica. Non senza fatica e sofferenza, i Nexus 6 saranno " ritirati" uno dopo l'altro fino allo scontro finale tra il poliziotto e l'elemento alfa del gruppo, l'angelico demone Roy Batty.

Los Angeles 2019. En flok oprørske replikanter er vendt tilbage til jorden og skjuler sig i storbyen. Dusørjægeren Deckard skal skaffe dem af vejen. Undervejs forelsker han sig i den smukke, sorthårede Rachael, som måske - måske ikke - er replikant. Kærlighedshistorien kaster et nyt lys over hans arbejde og gør det sværere for ham i slutopgøret med replikanternes leder.

Uma visão do futuro marcada pelo pessimismo, sobre a cidade de Los Angeles, algures no século XXI. Apesar da proclamada filiação em Metropolis de Fritz Lang, Blade Runner é exemplar da transformação da configuração da cidade no cinema e influenciou nitidamente filmes como Batman, Batman Returns e Dick Tracy. Um filme emblemático do fim da cidade racional substituída.

Man schreibt das Jahr 2019. Den Replikanten, künstlichen Menschen, ist bei Todesstrafe die Rückkehr zur Erde verboten. Doch trotzdem kehren eines Tages einige dieser Wesen zurück. Diese besondere Spezies verfügt über Kraft und Intelligenz mehrerer Menschen und ist von diesen kaum zu unterscheiden. Sie sollen unschädlich gemacht werden. Nur eine Spezialeinheit kann sie aufspüren: die Blade Runner. Eine atemberaubende Hetzjagd durch die futuristische Welt beginnt.

2019, Los Angeles. La Terre est surpeuplée et l’humanité est partie coloniser l’espace. Les nouveaux colons sont assistés de Replicants, androïdes que rien ne peut distinguer de l'être humain. Conçus comme de nouveaux esclaves, certains parmi les plus évolués s’affranchissent de leurs chaînes et s’enfuient. Rick Deckard, un ancien Blade Runner, catégorie spéciale de policiers chargés de "retirer" ces replicants, accepte une nouvelle mission consistant à retrouver quatre de ces individus qui viennent de regagner la Terre après avoir volé une navette spatiale.

A principios del siglo XXI, la Tyrell Corporation desarrolló un nuevo tipo de robot llamado Nexus, un ser virtualmente idéntico al hombre y conocido como Replicante.  Los Replicantes Nexus-6 eran superiores en fuerza y agilidad, y al menos iguales en inteligencia, a los ingenieros de genética que los crearon.  En el espacio exterior, los Replicantes fueron usados como trabajadores esclavos en la arriesgada exploración y colonización de otros planetas.  Después de la sangrienta rebelión de un equipo de combate de Nexus-6 en una colonia sideral, los Replicantes fueron declarados proscritos en la Tierra bajo pena de muerte.  Brigadas de policías especiales, con el nombre de Unidades de Blade Runners, tenían órdenes de tirar a matar al ver a cualquier Replicante invasor.  A esto no se le llamó ejecución, se le llamó retiro.

In the smog-choked dystopian Los Angeles of 2019, blade runner Rick Deckard is called out of retirement to terminate a quartet of replicants who have escaped to Earth seeking their creator for a way to extend their short life spans.
Androider gjør opprør mot menneskene i jakten på sitt innerste selv. Politimannen Rick Deckard tar opp jakten, men begynner etter hvert å tvile på om oppdraget er moralsk riktig.
Androider gjør opprør mot menneskene i jakten på sitt innerste selv. Politimannen Rick Deckard tar opp jakten, men begynner etter hvert å tvile på om oppdraget er moralsk riktig.
Androider gjør opprør mot menneskene i jakten på sitt innerste selv. Politimannen Rick Deckard tar opp jakten, men begynner etter hvert å tvile på om oppdraget er moralsk riktig.

År 2019 nedstiger en grupp förrymda replikanter på jorden i jakt på sin skapare, Dr Eldon Tyrell. Replikanter – genframställda människor – har visat sig vara farliga för människan eftersom de efter en tid utvecklar sina egna känslor. För att motverka detta är de tillverkade med en fyraårig livsspärr och bannlysta från jorden. De förrymda Replikanternas mål är att få denna livsspärr upphävd men tiden rinner snabbt iväg och mot sig har de Deckard – Blade Runner – med uppdrag att eliminera dem.
A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

2019年11月，刀锋跑者霍顿（Morgan Paull 饰）在泰瑞尔公司对新员工进行沃伊特-坎普夫测试时，被技师里昂·科瓦尔斯基（Brion James 饰）枪击。警监布莱恩特（M. Emmet Walsh 饰）不得不命老牌刀锋跑者戴克（Harrison Ford 饰）出马，猎杀复制人里昂、罗伊·巴蒂（Rutger Hauer 饰）、佐拉（Joanna Cassidy 饰）、普里斯（Daryl Hannah 饰）。戴克来到泰瑞尔公司调查，在艾登·泰瑞尔博士（Joe Turkel 饰）的请求下，对员工瑞秋（Sean Young 饰）进行了测试。百余问题之后，戴克判断瑞秋为复制人。而瑞秋本人对此真相竟一无所知……

2019년, 지구의 파괴와 엄청난 인구증가로 인해 다른 행성을 식민지 이주가 본격화된다. 2주전 6명의 복제 인간 리플리컨트가 식민행성에서 탈출, 23명을 죽이고 우주선을 탈취하여 지구로 잠입한다. 전투용 로이 베티와 리온, 살인 훈련을 받은 조라, 식민행성 군인 클럽 소속의 위안부 프리스가 그들이다. 이들은 타이렐사에 침입하려 하지만 한 사람이 죽고, 직원으로 위장한 리온이 회사 간부의 테스트에 발각되어 도주한다. 이에 경찰은 복제 인간을 구별할 능력을 지닌 블레이드 러너 데커드를 호출하는데...

2019年、酸性雨が降りしきり、昼なお暗いロサンゼルス。かつて逃亡した人造人間「レプリカント」を処分することが任務の特捜刑事「ブレードランナー」であったデッカードは、引退していたが強引に復職させられ、殺人を犯して逃亡する4体のレプリカントを追う任務に就くことになる。ネクサス6という最新型である彼らは、一見しただけでは普通の人間と区別がつかない。デッカードはネクサス6型を製造するタイレル社へ行き、社長秘書レイチェルに対して警察のレプリカント識別テストを試してみる。

電影描寫了反烏托邦的洛杉磯，大企業公司透過基因設計生產被稱為人造人的一種有機機械人，只用於地外殖民地中危險、卑下或娛樂業的工作。被稱作「銀翼殺手」的特別警察負責追捕及「退役」（即結束生命）反抗禁令並回到地球的人造人。主要劇情聚焦於已退休的銀翼殺手瑞克·戴克勉為其難地接下任務，去追捕一群在近日發動叛亂並偷渡回地球的人造人。在戴克調查的過程中，他與一名先進型號的人造人瑞秋開始了一段關係，使他對於人與人造人之間的人性差別產生質疑。

經典級的科幻片，導演雷利史考特（Ridley Scott）改變了一般人對未來世界的刻板印象。...... 2019年，在外太空殖民所增加人口，製造了為數不少的複製人，而這些複製人發生暴動，使得地球政府不得不提前讓他們「退休」。瑞克（Harrison Ford 飾）乃負責執行「銷毀」任務的「銀翼殺手」。而他卻在追殺的過程中，愛上了一位女複製人（《變男變女變變變》《華爾街》Sean Young 飾）……

二十一世纪初，泰勒公司先进机器人发展到了连锁阶段，那些机器人实际上和人类完全相同，被称为复制人，这些复制人在体力、敏捷度和智慧上都不错，被人类用于外世界从事奴隶的劳动、危险的探险工作及其他星球的殖民任务上，经过外界殖民地连锁六号战斗组的血腥暴动后，地球上宣布复制人为违法物——必须处死。特勤小组——银翼杀手受命侦查任何入侵复制人，并予以击毙。那不叫做处决，而是称之为退休。Rick Deckard（Harrison Ford 饰）就是银翼杀手之一，某天，他奉命追踪潜入泰勒公司的复制人Roy Batty（Rutger Hauer 饰）、Zhora（Joanna Cassidy 饰）、Leon（Brion James 饰）和Pris（Daryl Hannah 饰），和他搭档的是泰勒公司的连锁六号复制人Rachael（Sean Young 饰）在追踪的过程中，他和瑞秋产生了感情，明白了复制人们为了延长自身的机器寿命而做出的努力，渐渐地开始反思人类的命运。
1982 film by Ridley Scott
película de 1982 dirigida por Ridley Scott
film de Ridley Scott, sorti en 1982
Film von Ridley Scott (1982)
filme de ficção científica de 1982 realizado por Ridley Scott
Amerikansk Sci-fi film af Ridley Scott (1982)
film del 1982 diretto da Ridley Scott
